summary: The session focused on the impact of social environments on self-care practices and the challenges individuals face when friends do not support their self-care efforts. The user expressed frustration about friends who make fun of their self-care habits, leading to feelings of isolation, and sought advice on how to navigate these relationships while prioritizing their well-being.
facts: The user practices meditation and yoga as part of their self-care routine. The user feels frustrated when friends make fun of their self-care practices. The user believes their friends may be jealous of their commitment to self-care. The user seeks supportive individuals who share their values around self-care. The user has expressed feelings of isolation in their self-care journey. The user is considering setting boundaries with friends who are negative about their self-care. The user has mentioned feeling alone in their self-care efforts. The user has expressed a desire for their friends to understand the importance of self-care.
